'''shodhayaka''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Adjectives|adjective]] meaning "[[Wikt:labionasal|labionasal]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| sh-dh-y
|-
! Word class
| [[Adjective]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:labionasal|labionasal]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| shodhayaka
|}

== Agreement paradigm ==
''Positive degree, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:shodhayithi|shodhayithi]] || [[word:shodhayiji|shodhayiji]] || [[word:shodhayishi|shodhayishi]] || [[word:shodhayiki|shodhayiki]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:shodhayuthuthu|shodhayuthuthu]] || [[word:shodhayujuju|shodhayujuju]] || [[word:shodhayushushu|shodhayushushu]] || [[word:shodhayukuku|shodhayukuku]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:shodhayuthu|shodhayuthu]] || [[word:shodhayuju|shodhayuju]] || [[word:shodhayushu|shodhayushu]] || [[word:shodhayuku|shodhayuku]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:shodhayufthuf|shodhayufthuf]] || [[word:shodhayufjuf|shodhayufjuf]] || [[word:shodhayufshuf|shodhayufshuf]] || [[word:shodhayufkuf|shodhayufkuf]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:shodhayethe|shodhayethe]] || [[word:shodhayeje|shodhayeje]] || [[word:shodhayeshe|shodhayeshe]] || [[word:shodhayeke|shodhayeke]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:shodhayothotho|shodhayothotho]] || [[word:shodhayojojo|shodhayojojo]] || [[word:shodhayoshosho|shodhayoshosho]] || [[word:shodhayokoko|shodhayokoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:shodhayotho|shodhayotho]] || [[word:shodhayojo|shodhayojo]] || [[word:shodhayosho|shodhayosho]] || [[word:shodhayoko|shodhayoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:shodhayofthof|shodhayofthof]] || [[word:shodhayofjof|shodhayofjof]] || [[word:shodhayofshof|shodhayofshof]] || [[word:shodhayofkof|shodhayofkof]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[collective]] || [[word:shodhayĂŻfthĂŻf|shodhayĂŻfthĂŻf]] || [[word:shodhayĂŻfjĂŻf|shodhayĂŻfjĂŻf]] || [[word:shodhayĂŻfshĂŻf|shodhayĂŻfshĂŻf]] || [[word:shodhayĂŻfkĂŻf|shodhayĂŻfkĂŻf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[plural]] || [[word:shodhayĂŻfthĂŻfthĂŻf|shodhayĂŻfthĂŻfthĂŻf]] || [[word:shodhayĂŻfjĂŻfjĂŻf|shodhayĂŻfjĂŻfjĂŻf]] || [[word:shodhayĂŻfshĂŻfshĂŻf|shodhayĂŻfshĂŻfshĂŻf]] || [[word:shodhayĂŻfkĂŻfkĂŻf|shodhayĂŻfkĂŻfkĂŻf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[singular]] || [[word:shodhayĂŻfthĂŻf|shodhayĂŻfthĂŻf]] || [[word:shodhayĂŻfjĂŻf|shodhayĂŻfjĂŻf]] || [[word:shodhayĂŻfshĂŻf|shodhayĂŻfshĂŻf]] || [[word:shodhayĂŻfkĂŻf|shodhayĂŻfkĂŻf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[zero]] || [[word:shodhayĂŻfthĂŻf|shodhayĂŻfthĂŻf]] || [[word:shodhayĂŻfjĂŻf|shodhayĂŻfjĂŻf]] || [[word:shodhayĂŻfshĂŻf|shodhayĂŻfshĂŻf]] || [[word:shodhayĂŻfkĂŻf|shodhayĂŻfkĂŻf]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:shodhayĂŠthĂŠ|shodhayĂŠthĂŠ]] || [[word:shodhayĂŠjĂŠ|shodhayĂŠjĂŠ]] || [[word:shodhayĂŠshĂŠ|shodhayĂŠshĂŠ]] || [[word:shodhayĂŠkĂŠ|shodhayĂŠkĂŠ]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:shodhayathatha|shodhayathatha]] || [[word:shodhayajaja|shodhayajaja]] || [[word:shodhayashasha|shodhayashasha]] || [[word:shodhayakaka|shodhayakaka]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:shodhayatha|shodhayatha]] || [[word:shodhayaja|shodhayaja]] || [[word:shodhayasha|shodhayasha]] || [[word:shodhayaka|shodhayaka]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:shodhayafthaf|shodhayafthaf]] || [[word:shodhayafjaf|shodhayafjaf]] || [[word:shodhayafshaf|shodhayafshaf]] || [[word:shodhayafkaf|shodhayafkaf]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[positive]].none || [[word:shodhayasha|shodhayasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[visual]] || [[word:shodhayshĂ«sha|shodhayshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:shodhayrosha|shodhayrosha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[inferential]] || [[word:shodhaymusha|shodhaymusha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[optative]] || [[word:shodhayasha|shodhayasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:goshodhaynkshĂ«sha|goshodhaynkshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshodhaynkrosha|goshodhaynkrosha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshodhaynkmusha|goshodhaynkmusha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:goshodhaynkyasha|goshodhaynkyasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].none || [[word:shodhadhayasha|shodhadhayasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[visual]] || [[word:shodhadhayshĂ«sha|shodhadhayshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:shodhadhayrosha|shodhadhayrosha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:shodhadhaymusha|shodhadhaymusha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[optative]] || [[word:shodhadhayasha|shodhadhayasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:goshodhadhaynkshĂ«sha|goshodhadhaynkshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshodhadhaynkrosha|goshodhadhaynkrosha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshodhadhaynkmusha|goshodhadhaynkmusha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:goshodhadhaynkyasha|goshodhadhaynkyasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].none || [[word:shedhĂŠyasha|shedhĂŠyasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[visual]] || [[word:shedhĂŠyshĂ«sha|shedhĂŠyshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:shedhĂŠyrosha|shedhĂŠyrosha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:shedhĂŠymusha|shedhĂŠymusha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[optative]] || [[word:shedhĂŠyasha|shedhĂŠyasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:goshedhĂŠynkshĂ«sha|goshedhĂŠynkshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshedhĂŠynkrosha|goshedhĂŠynkrosha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshedhĂŠynkmusha|goshedhĂŠynkmusha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:goshedhĂŠynkyasha|goshedhĂŠynkyasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].none || [[word:shodhfayasha|shodhfayasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[visual]] || [[word:shodhfayshĂ«sha|shodhfayshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:shodhfayrosha|shodhfayrosha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:shodhfaymusha|shodhfaymusha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[optative]] || [[word:shodhfayasha|shodhfayasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:goshodhfaynkshĂ«sha|goshodhfaynkshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshodhfaynkrosha|goshodhfaynkrosha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshodhfaynkmusha|goshodhfaynkmusha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:goshodhfaynkyasha|goshodhfaynkyasha]]
|}

''36 forms generated.''

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki adjectives]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|d03cc2d}}
